instructions.content: NEVER create a .context/ file without the full YAML frontmatter block (title, type, status, date) — the pre-commit hook will block and the index cannot include the file.
NEVER include `related: []` when there are no related files — omit the key entirely instead of having an empty list.
Always regenerate .context/index.yaml after creating or updating a .context/ file using plugins/pantheon-org/context-index/scripts/regenerate-context-index.sh.
NEVER put findings or plans under .context/audits/ — that directory is owned by skill-auditor --store.
Set `status: draft` on creation; promote to `active` only when reviewed.
